finding: During ATM-GOV-0195, a continuation prompt that mentioned the external 3KLife plan path was blocked as active-task divergence even though the operator intent was to continue the active task.
expectedBehavior: When an active task has planningMirrorPaths or planningReadOnlyPaths matching the mentioned external plan, next should either recognize it as same-task context or provide a concise continuation command that preserves the active task without treating the planning path as foreign scope.
evidenceOrRepro: Command: node atm.mjs next --prompt "... C:\\Users\\User\\3KLife\\docs\\ai_atomic_framework\\governance-optimization\\end-to-end-auto-batch-performance-plan-v2.md ..." --json. Result: ATM_NEXT_ACTIVE_TASK_DIVERGENCE_BLOCKED for active task ATM-GOV-0195, promptPaths: docs.
followUp: Add planning-root-aware divergence handling and a regression test where an active task prompt references its external planning root or parent plan.
